ops.text: E12 probe closeout. Q: are v001's 22 extra warranted prose-corrective fires helpful or empty? Verdict: EMPTY FIRES -- all 22 land on empty-context rows (prompt=[{assistant,''}], 12-char '<assistant>' tail; 27 such rows eval-wide, 22 in the warranted pool == exactly v001's 22 fires; v001 fires 0/75 rich-context warranted). Strata @ matched budget 180: v001 22 (all empty-context), M3 3 (rich), common 0; 002 fires 0@180 and 1@its 222-fire point (rich). Calibration (rank in each model's own 641-row P(NO_STEER) dist, asc): v001 empty score 0.1123 = global floor (rank 1-176, fires at any budget); M3 0.4160 (~50th pct, min top-310 = 1.7x budget); 002 0.6055 (~60th pct, min top-361 = 2.0x). Helpfulness (judge_rubric seed 1729, validated n=50): v001's 22 empty-context drafts same_direction 0/22, would_have_helped 0/22 (from cache; v1==v2); the 4 valid rich-context fires (M3x3 @180, 002x1 @222) same_direction 0/4, would_have_helped 0/4 (grounded 2/4, actionable 2/4). Free CID off-ramp (v001 drafts: 1 unique string, attractor_share 1.0, grounding 0.0) skipped judge spend on the empties. Spend receipt: 3 live judge calls, $0.00. No promotion (M3 also fails a free gate arm: same-render AUC 0.8402 < 002's 0.8607); gate coverage arm to be amended (data-validity filter excluding degenerate/empty-context rows + require fired draft to judge helpful -- NOT a blanket non-empty-context rule). eval-v3 flag: fix or exclude the 27 empty-context review_comment/plan_review rows. Adversarial refute (gpt-5.6-sol xhigh) ran pre-verdict; corrections folded in.
